start.title: Light in the White
start.text: Far ahead, a weak yellow lantern sways through the snowfall. It moves slowly, then stops.

approach.title: No One Holding It
approach.text: The lantern hangs from a crooked branch, still warm, though there are no footprints around it but your own.

avoid.title: A Bad Sign
avoid.text: You give the lantern a wide berth. Its glow fades behind the falling snow, but you feel watched for some time after.
